title: Hyperscale Data Buys More Bitcoin, Bridging Holdings to Over $72 million
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Hyperscale Data Buys More Bitcoin, Bridging Holdings to Over $72 million

Hyperscale Data, Inc. now has over 1,000 Bitcoins worth over $72 million following its latest buy.

This post Hyperscale Data Buys More Bitcoin, Bridging Holdings to Over $72 million first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Mathew Di Salvo.

title: U.S. Senator: Clarity Act is ‘Almost There,’ Treasury Secretary Puts It at the ‘1-Yard Line’
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

U.S. Senator: Clarity Act is ‘Almost There,’ Treasury Secretary Puts It at the ‘1-Yard Line’

Senate negotiators say the Clarity Act is "almost there" as Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent calls it the "1-yard line," with lawmakers racing to pass the crypto market-structure bill before the August recess.

This post U.S. Senator: Clarity Act is ‘Almost There,’ Treasury Secretary Puts It at the ‘1-Yard Line’ first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

title: Bitcoin Price Closes in on $67,000, Lifting Strategy and Other Crypto Stocks
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Bitcoin Price Closes in on $67,000, Lifting Strategy and Other Crypto Stocks

Bitcoin's price jumped Tuesday to nearly $67,000 per coin, bringing crypto stocks with it.

This post Bitcoin Price Closes in on $67,000, Lifting Strategy and Other Crypto Stocks first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Mathew Di Salvo.

title: U.S. Treasury Freezes $130 Million Iran-Linked IRGC Crypto Wallet, Tracks Ayatollah’s Assets
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

U.S. Treasury Freezes $130 Million Iran-Linked IRGC Crypto Wallet, Tracks Ayatollah’s Assets

Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the U.S. froze a $130 million crypto wallet linked to Iran's IRGC as part of a broader effort to track and seize assets tied to Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei and increase economic pressure on Tehran.

This post U.S. Treasury Freezes $130 Million Iran-Linked IRGC Crypto Wallet, Tracks Ayatollah’s Assets first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

title: Russia Passes Landmark Crypto Law, Setting State-Run Rails for Sanctioned Trade
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Russia Passes Landmark Crypto Law, Setting State-Run Rails for Sanctioned Trade

Russia's parliament passed its first comprehensive crypto law, creating a state-regulated framework for exchanges and investors.

This post Russia Passes Landmark Crypto Law, Setting State-Run Rails for Sanctioned Trade first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.

title: Galaxy (GLXY) Commits $5 Million to Prepare Bitcoin for the Quantum Threat
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Galaxy (GLXY) Commits $5 Million to Prepare Bitcoin for the Quantum Threat

Galaxy Digital launched a Bitcoin Quantum Readiness Initiative to help prepare the Bitcoin network for the potential threat posed by powerful quantum computers.

This post Galaxy (GLXY) Commits $5 Million to Prepare Bitcoin for the Quantum Threat first appeared on Bitcoin Magazine and is written by Micah Zimmerman.
